title: Work and Opportunities for Women programme: project profile, Twinings Partnership
body: "The Work and Opportunities for Women (WOW) programme partnered with Twinings to support smallholder farmers in Kenya. Twinings had been working with the Lorna Young Foundation to fund a Farmers’ Voice Radio project which addresses farming practice, health, social norms and livelihood security.  With WOW support, this project was extended and the focus shifted to supporting smallholder tea farmers – in particular, women – to adopt agricultural practices that enhance resilience to climate change. This profile looks at what was delivered and what was achieved. "

taxons.title: Women and girls in developing countries
